data.content: Implemented Thinking Detail default-off filtering so conversation history shows only assistant responses, terminal stderr is hidden when detail is off, and terminal stream visibility is handled through shared helpers with regression tests. Validation: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Branch: work/foolery-d486-impl-20260321. Commit: a1d6fb14addc.
